claims.claimText: Page advertises Visiting Professorships — faculty/attending-level, not medical-student USCE.
claims.limitations: Single navigation phrase with no descriptive content; appears faculty-level not student-level.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Visiting Professorships are typically attending/faculty-level appointments, not pre-residency USCE.
claims.visibilityRationale: source scope HEALTH_SYSTEM_LEVEL cannot prove campus-specific availability without campusApplicabilityProof

claims.claimText: Department navigation references a 'Positions Available' section — faculty/staff job listings within CT Surgery.
claims.limitations: Navigation label only; no descriptive content for the positions on this page.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: 'Positions Available' on a department page typically refers to attending/faculty/staff openings — Tier 3.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 did not surface the 'Positions Available' navigation item even though it appears in the department side menu.
claims.visibilityRationale: source scope HEALTH_SYSTEM_LEVEL cannot prove campus-specific availability without campusApplicabilityProof

claims.claimText: Department footer surfaces a Careers link for CT Surgery — physician/staff career pathway entry.
claims.limitations: Footer link only; no job descriptions on this page.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Department-level Careers link — Tier 3 post-trainee career entry.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured 'Positions Available' implicitly through nav but did not capture the footer 'Careers' link.
claims.visibilityRationale: source scope HEALTH_SYSTEM_LEVEL cannot prove campus-specific availability without campusApplicabilityProof
